data.content: 1. src/lib/agent-history-identity.ts violates the acceptance fallback requirement: extractIdentityCandidate recursively accepts generic nested id/model-like strings and will label plain assistant payloads with message ids when no provider/model metadata exists. Reproduced with bun -e importing extractResponseAgentIdentity on {message:{id:"msg_d42af031b001E9LrZkGS9Wy7jp"}} returning {agentModel:"msg_d42af031b001E9LrZkGS9Wy7jp"}. This can change unrelated history rows/session headers instead of strictly falling back to existing session fields. 2. The intended render regression coverage is not active: src/components/__tests__/agent-history-session-card.test.tsx is excluded by the current unit Vitest include pattern (src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts). Running bunx vitest run src/components/__tests__/agent-history-session-card.test.tsx reports No test files found, so the UI surface in the acceptance criteria is not actually protected.
